# Problem Statements for Stress Testing

> Auto-generated batch 3 — 50 problems at varying depth (vague, semi-detailed, detailed) for self-healing loop.

## Museum & Art Collections

1. "We have a large art collection and no good way to search it."

2. "Our national museum has 2 million artifacts with catalog records spanning 150 years — handwritten index cards, legacy databases in dBASE and FileMaker, and modern entries in our collections management system. We want to digitize, normalize, and cross-reference all records, enable image similarity search so curators can find related works across cultures, and build a public API for researchers. We're also required to track provenance for repatriation claims under NAGPRA."

3. "We want to analyze visitor flow through our exhibition galleries using anonymized foot traffic sensors to optimize exhibit placement."

## Venture Capital & Investment Analysis

4. "We need better data to make investment decisions."

5. "Our venture capital firm evaluates 3,000 deals per year and invests in 20. We aggregate data from Crunchbase, PitchBook, LinkedIn, patent databases, app store rankings, and web traffic analytics. We want deal scoring models that predict startup success, portfolio company benchmarking dashboards, and automated due diligence document extraction. Our partners want a weekly digest showing how portfolio companies are performing against key metrics."

6. "We're a family office managing $2B across 50 fund investments and 200 direct holdings. We need consolidated performance reporting across disparate fund administrator reports."

## Pest Control & Environmental Services

7. "We want to be more proactive about pest problems instead of reactive."

8. "Our pest management company services 10,000 commercial accounts across restaurants, hotels, and food processing facilities. Technicians log inspection findings, treatment applications, and pest sightings on mobile devices. We want predictive models for pest pressure based on weather, season, and building characteristics, automated regulatory reporting for food safety audits, and route optimization for our 200 service vehicles."

9. "We run mosquito abatement for a county government and want to correlate trap counts, weather patterns, and larvicide applications to optimize treatment timing."

## Renewable Energy Trading

10. "We trade renewable energy and need faster market analytics."

11. "Our energy trading desk handles 10,000 transactions daily across power purchase agreements, renewable energy certificates (RECs), and carbon offsets. We need real-time price signal integration from multiple exchanges, position management dashboards, portfolio risk analytics using Monte Carlo simulations, and automated regulatory reporting for FERC and state commissions. Traders need sub-second decision support."

12. "We're a solar farm operator with 50 installations. We want to forecast energy production based on weather data and optimize when to sell to the grid vs. store in batteries."

## Public Health & Epidemiology

13. "We want to catch disease outbreaks faster."

14. "Our state health department monitors reportable diseases from 500 healthcare facilities, 200 laboratories, and 50 poison control centers. Data arrives via HL7 messages, fax, and manual entry. We need automated case classification using CDC criteria, cluster detection algorithms for outbreak identification, syndromic surveillance from emergency department chief complaints, and interactive disease incidence dashboards for epidemiologists and legislators."

15. "We want to track vaccination rates across school districts and correlate them with disease incidence to identify undervaccinated communities."

## Dental Practice Management

16. "Our dental group wants to use data to improve patient care."

17. "Our network of 100 dental offices generates 50,000 patient visits per month. We collect X-ray images, treatment plans, insurance claims, patient satisfaction surveys, and recall appointment compliance data. We want treatment outcome prediction models, chair utilization optimization, insurance reimbursement benchmarking, and automated patient recall scheduling based on risk scores. Our dentists are not tech-savvy."

18. "We want to analyze our no-show patterns and build a model to predict which patients will miss appointments so we can double-book intelligently."

## Mining & Mineral Exploration

19. "We drill a lot of holes and want to make better decisions about where to dig."

20. "Our gold mining operation processes 200,000 tonnes of ore per day. We collect geological survey data, drill core assay results, blast fragmentation analysis, equipment telemetry from our haul truck fleet, and environmental compliance monitoring data. We need geological block models updated with real-time assay data, haul truck dispatch optimization, mill throughput prediction based on ore characteristics, and automated environmental regulatory reporting."

21. "We're an exploration company with 10 active prospects. We want to correlate historical geological data with new survey results to prioritize drill targets and reduce exploration costs."

## Shipping & Maritime Logistics

22. "Our ships are expensive to run and we want to cut costs."

23. "Our container shipping line operates 40 vessels on 15 trade routes. Each vessel has 500+ sensors monitoring engine performance, fuel consumption, hull stress, and navigation data. We need voyage optimization using weather routing, predictive maintenance for engine components, bunker fuel consumption benchmarking, and port congestion prediction to optimize arrival times. We also need to comply with IMO emissions reporting requirements."

24. "We manage a port with 20 berths and want to optimize vessel scheduling, crane allocation, and yard planning using historical and real-time AIS data."

## Film & Television Production

25. "We want to use data to greenlight better projects."

26. "Our media company produces 50 films and 200 TV episodes per year. We have data on audience demographics, streaming viewership curves, social media engagement, critic reviews, comparable title performance, and production budgets. We want content performance prediction models, production budget optimization, audience overlap analysis across titles, and automated competitive benchmarking against other studios. Our creative executives trust their gut — we need to make data approachable."

27. "We're a streaming service and want to analyze viewing patterns to identify the optimal release strategy — binge vs weekly — for different content genres."

## Agriculture Cooperative

28. "Our farmers need to make better decisions."

29. "Our agricultural cooperative has 500 member farms growing corn, soybeans, and wheat. We aggregate yield data from combines, soil test results, satellite imagery, weather station data, and commodity futures prices. We want field-level yield prediction, variable rate application maps, crop insurance claim optimization, and a farmer-facing mobile dashboard showing personalized agronomic recommendations. Cell connectivity is unreliable in rural areas."

30. "We manage a grain elevator network and want to optimize storage allocation and logistics based on harvest forecasts and rail car availability."

## Fitness & Wellness Technology

31. "We want to help our users get healthier with data."

32. "Our fitness platform has 5 million users wearing connected devices that track heart rate, sleep, steps, workouts, and nutrition logging. We ingest 2 billion data points per day. We need real-time workout intensity feedback, personalized training plan recommendations, sleep quality scoring, and population health analytics for our corporate wellness clients. User privacy is critical — we're subject to state biometric data laws."

33. "We run a chain of 100 gyms and want to predict member churn based on visit frequency, class attendance, and engagement with our mobile app."

## Utility Asset Management

34. "Our infrastructure is aging and we don't know what to replace first."

35. "Our gas utility manages 20,000 miles of distribution pipeline, 500 regulator stations, and 1 million service connections. We have inspection records, leak survey data, pipe material and vintage records, cathodic protection readings, and emergency response logs. We need risk-based replacement prioritization, leak prediction models, damage prevention analytics for excavation near pipelines, and regulatory compliance reporting for PHMSA."

36. "We run a fleet of 500 utility poles and want to prioritize inspections based on age, weather exposure, vegetation proximity, and historical failure data."

## Event Management & Ticketing

37. "We want to sell more tickets and run better events."

38. "Our event management company produces 500 events per year from concerts to corporate conferences. We collect ticket sales data, marketing campaign performance, social media mentions, attendee survey responses, and venue capacity utilization. We want demand forecasting for ticket pricing optimization, marketing attribution modeling, attendee sentiment analysis from post-event surveys, and real-time event capacity monitoring for safety compliance."

39. "We manage a 50,000-seat stadium and want to optimize concession staffing and inventory based on predicted attendance, weather, and day of week."

## Library & Archives

40. "We want to make our collections more accessible."

41. "Our research library has 10 million items including books, manuscripts, photographs, maps, and audio recordings. We have metadata in MARC format, Dublin Core, and proprietary databases. We want to build a unified discovery layer with full-text search across digitized content, implement linked data for cross-referencing with other institutions, and analyze usage patterns to inform acquisition decisions. We're bound by copyright restrictions on 40% of our holdings."

42. "We run an archive of 5 million historical photographs. We want to use AI to tag photos with subjects, locations, and time periods to make them searchable."

## Veterinary Diagnostics

43. "We want to catch animal diseases earlier."

44. "Our veterinary lab network processes 100,000 diagnostic samples per week — blood panels, tissue biopsies, parasitology, and molecular PCR tests. Results feed into breed-specific reference ranges. We want disease prevalence trend analytics by region and species, lab turnaround time optimization, automated critical value alerting to veterinarians, and export capabilities for state agriculture department reporting. Some tests require chain-of-custody documentation."

45. "We run an equine hospital and want to build a database of surgical outcomes correlated with pre-operative diagnostics to improve treatment protocols."

## Home Services & Field Operations

46. "Our technicians waste time driving around."

47. "Our home services company dispatches 500 HVAC, plumbing, and electrical technicians daily. We track GPS locations, job completion times, parts usage, customer satisfaction ratings, and callback rates. We need real-time dispatch optimization, predictive parts inventory for each truck, technician performance benchmarking, first-time fix rate improvement models, and customer appointment window prediction. We want to go from 4-hour windows to 1-hour windows."

48. "We run a property inspection company and want to automate report generation from field photos and standardized checklists."

## Cannabis & Controlled Substances

49. "We need to track every gram from seed to sale for compliance."

50. "Our multi-state cannabis operation runs 20 cultivation facilities and 80 retail dispensaries. State regulators require seed-to-sale tracking with full chain of custody — every plant, harvest batch, extraction run, and retail transaction must be traceable. We need batch genealogy tracking, yield optimization models for different cultivars, demand forecasting by product category and location, and automated regulatory reporting to each state's tracking system. Data cannot cross state lines."
